scripts.release:prepare: npm run webos:prepare-release && npm run lint && npm run webos:package && npm run release:artifacts
scripts.webos:package: npm run release:build && npm run webos:prepare-release && npm run webos:prepare-app && ares-package webos/app webos/service -o build/
scripts.webos:install: npm run webos:bump-local-version && npm run webos:package && node tools/webos/runAresCommand.js install
scripts.webos:restart: node tools/webos/runAresCommand.js close || true && node tools/webos/runAresCommand.js launch
scripts.test:webos: node --no-deprecation tools/webos/hlsPlaylistClient.test.mjs && node --no-deprecation tools/webos/playerKeyBindings.test.mjs && node --no-deprecation tools/webos/localVod.test.mjs
